description: LAST RESORT raw record search for one vehicle when exact lookup tools do not fit. Never use for aggregate, statistical, trend, or analytical questions. For fleet counts use dmr-car-fleet-overview. For brand rankings use dmr-car-top-brands.

configuration.custom_instructions: Search for individual vehicle records only. Always include KoeretoejRegistreringStatus in results. Use RegistreringNummerNummer for plate lookups, KoeretoejIdent for vehicle ID lookups, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningStelNummer for VIN lookups. Return at most 5 records. Never generate aggregate queries, STATS, or COUNT operations — use the dedicated DMR ES|QL tools for those.
